---
title: "Installing immunedeconv package for practical 6"
output: html_notebook
---
These packages have more recent versions available.
It is recommended to update all of them.
Which would you like to update?

1: All                                               
2: CRAN packages only                                
3: None                                              
4: MCPcounter (b6eac73e9... -> 7ea6e040a...) [GitHub]
5: rlang      (1.1.4        -> 1.1.5       ) [CRAN]  
6: curl       (6.1.0        -> 6.2.0       ) [CRAN]  


###>> enter 3 if you receive above message for all installation

```{r}
install.packages(c("devtools","curl")) ##Installs devtools and the MCPcounter dependancy 'curl'
library(devtools)
devtools::install_github("ebecht/MCPcounter",ref="master", subdir="Source")
devtools::install_github("cansysbio/ConsensusTME")
devtools::install_github("omnideconv/immunedeconv")
```
